Generate legally compliant HR letters in minutes

CCMA-compliant templates, a guided wizard, and full audit trails — built for South African employers.

Features

Everything you need for HR compliance

Generate, manage, and track disciplinary letters with confidence.

CCMA-Compliant Templates

Pre-built letter templates that meet CCMA requirements. Verbal warnings, written warnings, final warnings, and dismissals.

Step-by-Step Wizard

A guided process walks you through each letter. Select the employee, choose the offence, and the letter writes itself.

Employee Management

Maintain a central employee register. Track disciplinary history, warnings issued, and follow-up dates.

PDF Export & Audit Trail

Export professional PDF letters instantly. Every action is logged for a complete audit trail if disputes arise.

Role-Based Access

Manager, HR, and HOD roles with appropriate permissions. Control who can create, review, and approve letters.

Review & Follow-Up Tracking

Set follow-up dates and track review status. Never miss a disciplinary deadline or escalation window.

How It Works

Three steps to a compliant letter

1

Select Employee & Offence

Choose the employee from your register and select the type of misconduct or performance issue.

2

Complete the Wizard

Follow the guided steps to fill in the details. The system ensures all legally required fields are completed.

3

Generate & Deliver

Export a professional PDF letter, ready for signature and delivery. The audit trail is updated automatically.

Why Choose Us

Built in South Africa,
for South African employers

We understand the LRA, the CCMA, and what happens when disciplinary processes aren't followed correctly.

CCMA & LRA Aligned

Templates built around South African labour law requirements. Not adapted from overseas — built here from scratch.

ZAR Pricing

No USD conversions, no surprise exchange rate hikes. Predictable Rand-based annual pricing.

Direct Support

No ticket queues, no chatbots. WhatsApp the founder directly. Real humans, same timezone.

Fast & Lightweight

Built for South African internet. Loads fast, works on any device, and respects your data budget.

Pricing

Simple, annual pricing

One annual fee covers your entire organisation. No per-user charges, no hidden costs.

From R5,000 /year

Pricing varies by organisation size. Contact us for a tailored quote.

disciplinary process?
